title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises!
